version.description: Workflow schema version. Optional, defaults to 1. Reserved for future schema changes.

env.description: Top-level environment variables, inherited by all tasks and steps

secrets.description: Action invocations executed sequentially before any task. Each entry registers values into the run-scoped secret table for later reference via ${{ secrets.<name> }}. Only uses: steps are permitted — run: and docker: are rejected.

shell.description: Default shell for run: steps (defaults to $SHELL)

cwd.description: Default working directory for run: steps

env.description: Default environment variables for run: steps

action.description: Defaults for uses: action steps, keyed by runtime language

bin.description: CLI template for invoking the runner script. {0} is substituted with the runner script path.

with.description: Key-value map of inputs passed to an action

defaults.description: Task-level defaults for step execution (overrides top-level defaults)

env.description: Task-level environment variables, inherited by all steps

steps.description: Ordered list of steps to execute

required.description: Whether the input must be provided

id.description: Unique identifier for this step, used to reference outputs in expressions

name.description: Display name for the step, shown in CLI output

run.description: Shell command to execute. Multi-line commands (YAML |) execute as a single shell invocation via $SHELL -c. Note: ${{ }} expressions are NOT evaluated inside run: strings, and zorb does not auto-inject any env vars — the command is passed to the shell unmodified. To use an input, step output, or expression result, declare it explicitly under env: (at workflow, task, or step level) using ${{ }}, then read it natively as $NAME in the shell.

uses.description: Code action or workflow task reference. Resolves as: local file (./path.action), NPM package (@scope/package/action), or cross-file workflow (./other/zorb.taskname)

with.description: Inputs passed to a uses: action

env.description: Step-level environment variables (overrides task and top-level env)

cwd.description: Working directory for run: steps (defaults to directory containing zorb.yml)

shell.description: Override shell for this run: step

docker.description: Run the command inside a Docker container. Short form: image name string. Long form: object with image and options

timeout.description: Maximum duration the step is allowed to run before it is killed. Format: e.g. '500ms', '30s', '5m', '1h'.

retries.description: Number of additional attempts after the first if the step fails. Total attempts = retries + 1.

backoff.description: Delay strategy between retries. 'linear' delays grow by 1s each attempt; 'exponential' doubles each attempt (base 1s).

bin.description: Override the runtime launch template for this uses: step. {0} is substituted with the runner script path.

id.description: Unique identifier for this entry, used to reference outputs in expressions

name.description: Display name for the entry, shown in CLI output

uses.description: Action reference: local file (./path.action), NPM package (@scope/package/action), or cross-file workflow (./other/zorb.taskname)

timeout.description: Maximum duration the entry is allowed to run before it is killed. Format: e.g. '500ms', '30s', '5m', '1h'.

retries.description: Number of additional attempts after the first if the entry fails. Total attempts = retries + 1.

backoff.description: Delay strategy between retries. 'linear' delays grow by 1s each attempt; 'exponential' doubles each attempt (base 1s).

bin.description: Override the runtime launch template for this entry. {0} is substituted with the runner script path.

workdir.description: Working directory inside the container (-w flag)
